briefdescription.para: Retrain SuperSpeed link, Perform Hot reset, Switch to Loop back mode.
Test the transmitter for compliance to voltage and timing specifications.
Retrain SuperSpeed link, Perform Hot reset, Switch to Loop back mode.
Test the transmitter for compliance to voltage and timing specifications.

parameterdescription.para: This typedef defines link state change.

briefdescription.para: Sets mode of core to USB Device/Host/OTG.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XUsbPsu instance to be worked on.

Mode to set
XUSBPSU_GCTL_PRTCAP_OTG
XUSBPSU_GCTL_PRTCAP_HOST
XUSBPSU_GCTL_PRTCAP_DEVICE

detaileddescription.para: All OUT endpoints are even numbered and all IN endpoints are odd numbered. EP0 is for Control OUT and EP1 is for Control IN.

para.verbatim: - initializes a specific XUsbPsu instance. - sets up Event Buffer for Core to write events. - Core Reset and PHY Reset. - Sets core in Device Mode. - Sets default speed as HIGH_SPEED. - Sets Device Address to 0. - Enables interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Points to the XUsbPsu device configuration structure.

Device base address in the virtual memory address space. If the address translation is not used then the physical address is passed. Unexpected errors may occur if the address mapping is changed after this function is invoked.

briefdescription.para: Starts the controller so that host can detect this device.
Stops the controller so that the device disconnects from the host.
Gets current state of USB link.
Sets USB Link to a particular State.
Enable Accept U1 and U2 sleep enable.
Checks if the current speed is super speed or not.
Returns the data pointer of driver instance.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XUsbPsu instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Sets driver data from driver like speed/state.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XUsbPsu instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function is used as chapter 9 interrupt handler.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XUsbPsu instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the XUsbPsu instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function is used as disconnect interrupt handler.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XUsbPsu instance to be worked on.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct XUsbPsu *InstancePtr, u8 UsbEpNum, u8 Dir, u16 Maxsize, u8 Type, u8 Restore)
memberdef.name: XUsbPsu_EpEnable

parameterdescription.para: Typically False, True if saved state has to be restored.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct XUsbPsu *InstancePtr, u8 UsbEp, u8 *BufferPtr, u32 BufferLen)
memberdef.name: XUsbPsu_EpBufferSend

briefdescription.para: Initiates DMA to send data on endpoint to the host.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to data. This data buffer is cache-aligned.

simplesect.para: This function is expected to initiates DMA to send data on endpoint towards host. This data buffer should be aligned.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct XUsbPsu *InstancePtr, u8 UsbEp, u8 *BufferPtr, u32 Length)
memberdef.name: XUsbPsu_EpBufferRecv

briefdescription.para: Initiates DMA to receive data on endpoint from host.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to data. This data buffer is cache-aligned.
Length of data to be received.

simplesect.para: This function is expected to initiates DMA to receive data on the endpoint from the host. This data buffer should be aligned.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct XUsbPsu *InstancePtr, u8 Epnum, u8 Dir, void(*Handler)(void *, u32, u32))
memberdef.name: XUsbPsu_SetEpHandler

briefdescription.para: Sets an user handler to be called after data is sent/received by an endpoint.
Returns status of endpoint whether it is stalled or not.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct XUsbPsu *InstancePtr, u8 UsbEpNum, u8 Dir, u8 Force)
memberdef.name: XUsbPsu_StopTransfer

parameterdescription.para: Void pointer to the XUsbPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: Enables an interrupt in event enable RegValister.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XUsbPsu instance to be worked on.

OR of any interrupt enable Masks:
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_VNDRDEVTSTRCVEDEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_EVNTOVERFLOWEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_CMDCMPLTEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_ERRTICERREN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_SOFEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_EOPFEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_HIBERNATIONREQEVTEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_WKUPEVTEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_ULSTCNGEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_CONNECTDONEEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_USBRSTEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_DISCONNEVTEN

briefdescription.para: Disables an interrupt in event enable RegValister.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XUsbPsu instance to be worked on.

OR of Interrupt Enable Masks
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_VNDRDEVTSTRCVEDEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_EVNTOVERFLOWEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_CMDCMPLTEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_ERRTICERREN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_SOFEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_EOPFEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_HIBERNATIONREQEVTEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_WKUPEVTEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_ULSTCNGEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_CONNECTDONEEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_USBRSTEN
XUSBPSU_DEVTEN_DISCONNEVTEN

briefdescription.para: Sets the device address of the core.
This function puts the controller into idle state by stopping the transfers for all endpoints, stopping the usb core, and clearing the event buffers.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XUsbPsu instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Sets speed of the core for connecting to host.

parameterdescription.para:
Required speed
XUSBPSU_DCFG_HIGHSPEED
XUSBPSU_DCFG_FULLSPEED2
XUSBPSU_DCFG_LOWSPEED
XUSBPSU_DCFG_FULLSPEED1

briefdescription.para: Stalls control endpoint and restarts to receive setup packet.
Looks up the device configuration based on the unique device ID/BaseAddress.

detaileddescription.para: The table contains the configuration info for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration table entry corresponding to the given device ID/BaseAddress, or NULL if no match is found.
In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: Returns zeroed parameters to be used by Endpoint commands.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct XUsbPsu *InstancePtr, u8 UsbEpNum, u8 Dir, u32 Cmd, struct XUsbPsu_EpParams *Params)
memberdef.name: XUsbPsu_SendEpCmd

briefdescription.para: Sends Endpoint command to the Endpoint.
Checks the data phase and calls user endpoint handler.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the Endpoint event occurred in core.

briefdescription.para: Checks the status phase and starts next control transfer.
Starts status phase of control transfer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the Endpoint event occurred in core.

briefdescription.para: Ends data phase which is used in case of the error.
Enables USB control endpoint that is EP0OUT and EP0IN of Core.
Resets event buffer registers to zero so that events are not written by Core.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XUsbPsu instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the XUsbPsu instance to be worked on.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct XUsbPsu *InstancePtr, u32 Offset, u32 BitMask, u32 Timeout)
memberdef.name: XUsbPsu_WaitClearTimeout

briefdescription.para: Waits until a bit in a register is cleared or timeout occurs.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XUsbPsu instance to be worked on.
Bit mask of required bit to be checked.
Time to wait specified in micro seconds.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct XUsbPsu *InstancePtr, u32 Offset, u32 BitMask, u32 Timeout)
memberdef.name: XUsbPsu_WaitSetTimeout

briefdescription.para: Waits until a bit in a register is set or timeout occurs.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XUsbPsu instance to be worked on
Bit mask of required bit to be checked.
Time to wait specified in micro seconds.

briefdescription.para: Sets the register bits with the bit mask value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XUsbPsu instance to be worked on
Bit mask of required bit to be checked.

briefdescription.para: Clears the register bits with the bit mask value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XUsbPsu instance to be worked on.
Bit mask of required bit to be checked.

briefdescription.para: Reads data from hardware parameters registers of the core.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XUsbPsu instance to be worked on

Register number to read.
XUSBPSU_GHWPARAMS0
XUSBPSU_GHWPARAMS1
XUSBPSU_GHWPARAMS2
XUSBPSU_GHWPARAMS3
XUSBPSU_GHWPARAMS4
XUSBPSU_GHWPARAMS5
XUSBPSU_GHWPARAMS6
XUSBPSU_GHWPARAMS7

simplesect.para: One of the GHWPARAMS RegValister contents.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XUsbPsu instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if initialization was not successful.

briefdescription.para: Sets up the event buffers so that events are written by Core.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XUsbPsu instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Returns transfer index assigned by Core for an endpoint transfer.
Sends start new configuration command to the endpoint.

simplesect.para:
As per data book this command should be issued by software under these conditions:
After power-on-reset with XferRscIdx=0 before starting to configure Physical Endpoints 0 and 1.
With XferRscIdx=2 before starting to configure Physical Endpoints > 1
This command should always be issued to Endpoint 0 (DEPCMD0).

memberdef.argsstring: (struct XUsbPsu *InstancePtr, u8 UsbEpNum, u8 Dir, u16 Size, u8 Type, u8 Restore)
memberdef.name: XUsbPsu_SetEpConfig

briefdescription.para: Sends set endpoint configuration command to the endpoint.

parameterdescription.para: Typically false, true if saved state has to be restored.

briefdescription.para: Sends set transfer resource command to the endpoint.
Clears stall on all stalled endpoints.
Initiates DMA on control endpoint 0 to receive setup packet.
Handles transfer complete event of control endpoints EP0 OUT and EP0 IN.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the Endpoint event occurred in core.

briefdescription.para: Handles transfer not ready event of control endpoints EP0 OUT and EP0 IN.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the Endpoint event occurred in core.

briefdescription.para: Initiates DMA to send data on control endpoint EP0 IN to host.
Initiates DMA to receive data on control endpoint EP0 OUT from host.

parameterdescription.para: Length of data to be received.

briefdescription.para: Queries endpoint state and saves it in EpSavedState.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XUsbPsu pointer structure.

briefdescription.para: Checks the data phase and calls user endpoint handler.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the endpoint event occurred in core.

briefdescription.para: For Isochronous transfer, gets the microframe time and calls respective endpoint handler.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the Endpoint event occurred in core.
Endpoint Event occurred in the core.

briefdescription.para: Device event handler for device specific events.
Processes events in an event buffer.
Handle interrupts of control endpoints EP0 OUT and EP0 IN.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the Endpoint event occurred in core.

briefdescription.para: Interrupt handler which indicates that the connection is completed.
Processes an event entry in the event Buffer.
Vendor Device Test LMP Received Event.

detaileddescription.para: This patch adds hibernation support to usbpsu driver when dwc3 is operating as a gadget.
This is an internal file containing the definitions for endpoints.

para.preformatted: MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 sg 06/16/16 First release 1.1 sg 10/24/16 Added new function XUsbPsu_IsSuperSpeed 1.4 bk 12/01/18 Modify USBPSU driver code to fit USB common example code for all USB IPs. myk 12/01/18 Added hibernation support for device mode 1.4 vak 30/05/18 Removed xusb_wrapper files vak 24/09/18 Add support for connecting to host in high-speed 1.5 vak 02/06/19 Add API for idling usb controller 1.6 pm 22/07/19 Removed coverity warnings pm 08/08/19 Added support to set AXI-Cache bits when CCI is enable pm 28/08/19 Removed 80-character warnings 1.7 pm 02/20/20 Add support to set CCI bit in Coherency Mode Register when CCI is enable pm 03/23/20 Restructured the code for more readability and modularity 1.8 pm 24/07/20 Fixed MISRA-C and Coverity warnings 1.12 pm 10/08/22 Update doxygen tag and addtogroup version 1.15 np 26/03/24 Add doxygen and editorial fixes
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 pm 03/03/20 First release 1.8 pm 24/07/20 Fixed MISRA-C and Coverity warnings 1.10 pm 24/07/21 Fixed MISRA-C and Coverity warnings 1.12 pm 10/08/22 Update doxygen tag and addtogroup version 1.15 np 26/03/24 Add doxygen and editorial fixes 1.18 nk 23/10/25 Added cache flush/invalidate when EL1_NONSECURE is not defined.
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 sg 06/06/16 First release 1.3 vak 04/03/17 Added CCI support for USB 1.4 bk 12/01/18 Modify USBPSU driver code to fit USB common example code for all USB IPs. 1.4 vak 30/05/18 Removed xusb_wrapper files 1.6 pm 28/08/19 Removed 80-character warnings 1.7 pm 23/03/20 Restructured the code for more readability and modularity 1.8 pm 24/07/20 Fixed MISRA-C and Coverity warnings 1.12 pm 10/08/22 Update doxygen tag and addtogroup version 1.15 np 26/03/24 Add doxygen and editorial fixes 1.18 nk 23/10/25 Added cache flush/invalidate when EL1_NONSECURE is not defined.
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 pm 03/03/20 First release 1.7 pm 25/03/20 Add clocking support 1.8 pm 22/08/20 Configure register bits when CCI is enable pm 24/08/20 Fixed MISRA-C and Coverity warnings 1.12 pm 10/08/22 Update doxygen tag and addtogroup version 1.13 pm 04/01/23 Use Xil_WaitForEvent() API for register bit polling 1.14 pm 09/09/23 Fixed HIS_VOCF metric violation - created common functions for set and clear register bits. 1.14 pm 12/09/23 Fixed HIS RETURN Violations 1.15 np 26/03/24 Add doxygen and editorial fixes 1.18 nk 23/10/25 Added cache flush/invalidate when EL1_NONSECURE is not defined.
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 sg 06/06/16 First release 1.3 vak 04/03/17 Added CCI support for USB 1.4 bk 12/01/18 Modify USBPSU driver code to fit USB common example code for all USB IPs myk 12/01/18 Added hibernation support for device mode 1.4 vak 30/05/18 Removed xusb_wrapper files 1.6 pm 22/07/19 Removed coverity warnings pm 28/08/19 Removed 80-character warnings 1.7 pm 23/03/20 Restructured the code for more readability and modularity 1.8 pm 24/07/20 Fixed MISRA-C and Coverity warnings 1.12 pm 10/08/22 Update doxygen tag and addtogroup version 1.15 np 26/03/24 Add doxygen and editorial fixes

detaileddescription.para: It is included by the xusbps_endpoint.c which is implementing the endpoint functions and by xusbps_intr.c.

para.preformatted: MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 sg 06/06/16 First release 1.4 bk 12/01/18 Modify USBPSU driver code to fit USB common example code for all USB IPs. 1.6 pm 22/07/18 Removed coverity warning- INCLUDE_RECURSION 1.8 pm 24/07/20 Fixed MISRA-C and Coverity warnings 1.9 pm 15/03/21 Fixed doxygen warnings
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 pm 03/03/20 First release 1.8 pm 24/07/20 Fixed MISRA-C and Coverity warnings 1.12 pm 10/08/22 Update doxygen tag and addtogroup version 1.14 pm 09/09/23 Fixed MISRA C-2012 Rule 10.3 violation 1.15 pm 26/03/24 Add doxygen and editorial fixes 1.18 nk 23/10/25 Added cache flush/invalidate when EL1_NONSECURE is not defined.
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 pm 03/23/20 First release 1.8 pm 24/07/20 Fixed MISRA-C and Coverity warnings 1.12 pm 10/08/22 Update doxygen tag and addtogroup version 1.15 np 26/03/24 Add doxygen and editorial fixes 1.18 nk 23/10/25 Added cache flush/invalidate when EL1_NONSECURE is not defined.
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 pm 03/03/20 First release 1.8 pm 01/07/20 Add versal hibernation support pm 24/07/20 Fixed MISRA-C and Coverity warnings 1.12 pm 10/08/22 Update doxygen tag and addtogroup version 1.15 np 26/03/24 Add doxygen and editorial fixes 1.18 nk 23/10/25 Added cache flush/invalidate when EL1_NONSECURE is not defined.
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 Mayank 12/01/18 First release 1.5 VAK 14/03/19 Enable hibernation related functions only when XUSBPSU_HIBERNATION_ENABLE is defined 1.7 pm 23/03/20 Restructured the code for more readability and modularity pm 25/03/20 Add clocking support 1.8 pm 01/07/20 Add versal hibernation support pm 24/07/20 Fixed MISRA-C and Coverity warnings 1.12 pm 10/08/22 Update doxygen tag and addtogroup version 1.13 pm 04/01/23 Use Xil_WaitForEvent() API for register bit polling 1.14 pm 21/06/23 Added support for system device-tree flow. 1.15 np 26/03/24 Add doxygen and editorial fixes 1.18 nk 23/10/25 Added cache flush/invalidate when EL1_NONSECURE is not defined.
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 sg 06/06/16 First release 1.4 myk 12/01/18 Added support of hibernation 1.6 pm 08/08/19 Added AXI-Cache bits masking for CCI feature is enable 1.7 pm 02/20/20 Added Coherency Mode Register for CCI feature is enable 1.8 pm 07/01/20 Add versal hibernation support pm 24/07/20 Fixed MISRA-C and Coverity warnings 1.9 pm 15/03/21 Fixed doxygen warnings 1.14 pm 21/06/23 Added support for system device-tree flow. 1.15 np 26/03/24 Add doxygen and editorial fixes
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 sg 06/06/16 First release 1.3 vak 04/03/17 Added CCI support for USB 1.4 bk 12/01/18 Modify USBPSU driver code to fit USB common example code for all USB IPs myk 12/01/18 Added hibernation support vak 22/01/18 Added changes for supporting microblaze platform vak 13/03/18 Moved the setup interrupt system calls from driver to example. 1.4 vak 30/05/18 Removed xusb_wrapper files 1.7 pm 23/03/20 Restructured the code for more readability and modularity pm 25/03/20 Add clocking support 1.8 pm 01/07/20 Add versal hibernation support 1.12 pm 10/08/22 Update doxygen tag and addtogroup version 1.14 pm 04/01/23 Use Xil_WaitForEvent() API for register bit polling 1.15 np 26/03/24 Add doxygen and editorial fixes
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 sg 06/06/16 First release 1.9 pm 03/15/21 Fixed doxygen warnings 1.12 pm 08/10/22 Update doxygen tag and addtogroup version 1.14 pm 21/06/23 Added support for system device-tree flow. 1.15 np 26/03/24 Add doxygen and editorial fixes 1.19 bdk 12/08/25 Updated comments to support SDT flow for Doxygen documentation.
